description_long: This is a roughly rectangular stone block with a rugged, stratified surface, displaying prominent layers of brown, tan, and ochre hues. The block has irregular, jagged edges and a visibly weathered texture, with natural banding patterns running horizontally across its faces. One end of the block features a black-and-white measurement scale and some handwritten markings, suggesting it has been cataloged or studied. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or artificial modifications beyond the markings. Its surfaces are uneven, with some areas protruding more than others, giving it a distinctly natural, unrefined appearance. The overall form and coloration suggest it could be used as a barrier or obstacle in an urban or landscaped environment.
description: A rugged, stratified stone block with layered brown and tan bands, jagged edges, and visible weathering. One end features a measurement scale and handwritten markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the block, with clear horizontal banding and a measurement scale with markings on the left end.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the block's thickness and the rough, uneven surface texture, with less visible banding.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the block's broad face, prominent stratification, and natural color variations.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the end with the measurement scale and handwritten markings, showing the block's layered structure.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or landscaped park border
attribute_installation_method: dry-stacked or placed directly on compacted soil or gravel
attribute_weathering_pattern: Visible surface weathering with rough, chipped edges and some discoloration, indicating exposure to the elements.
attribute_presence_of_markings_or_engrav: Handwritten markings and a measurement scale are visible on one end.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: Isolated, but could be aligned or stacked with other blocks in a barrier or edging.
